message:
chore(node): modernize Rust idioms and replace panic with unreachable

Remove dead root_pointer module declaration in main.rs. Remove unused
imports in api/service.rs integration tests. Replace broken ISO timestamp
hack with proper chrono::DateTime<Utc> RFC3339 formatting in
compatibility_gate.rs. Replace bare .unwrap() with descriptive .expect()
on SHA-256 slice conversions in transparency_verifier.rs. Use .values()
iterator instead of destructuring unused keys in lifecycle.rs (3 instances).
Replace assert!(len >= 1) with idiomatic assert!(!is_empty()) in
lockstep_harness.rs. Replace panic! with unreachable! in 4 test match
arms in sdk/verifier/capsule.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
